title: What is AI Application Architecture?
summary: AI Application Architecture is the discipline of designing distributed systems that combine retrieval, agents, memory, tools, evaluation, and continuous improvement while meeting latency, cost, reliability, and safety requirements.
use_when: User asks for the definition, scope, or purpose of AI Application Architecture.

title: Start with simple RAG; add agentic complexity only when metrics prove it necessa
summary: Start with simple RAG; add agentic complexity only when metrics prove it necessary.
use_when: User asks a practical or factual question about AI Application Architecture.

title: Instrument every component (tokens, latency, retrieval quality, cost, user satis
summary: Instrument every component (tokens, latency, retrieval quality, cost, user satisfaction) from day 1.
use_when: User asks a practical or factual question about AI Application Architecture.

title: Model routing + caching + small-model preference is the dominant cost-control pa
summary: Model routing + caching + small-model preference is the dominant cost-control pattern.

summary: Governance (safety, PII, audit logs) must be designed into the architecture, not bolted on.
